title: Patient Care Coordinator
description: Syneos Health is seeking a Patient Care Coordinator to support our Sacramento clinical research site. You'll work directly with study participants, scheduling appointments and ensuring smooth trial operations. Join a healthcare company dedicated to bringing innovative treatments to patients faster.
responsibilities: Schedule patient visits and manage appointment calendars for clinical trials
Conduct patient phone screening calls and collect baseline health information
Escort patients through study procedures and ensure informed consent compliance
Collect and organize patient case report forms and study documentation
Communicate trial status updates to study sponsors and monitors
Maintain patient confidentiality and follow HIPAA protocols

requirements.education: High School diploma or GED; Associate's degree in healthcare preferred
skills: Strong communication and patient interaction skills
Organizational ability and attention to detail
Proficiency with computer systems and data entry
Knowledge of clinical trial procedures (training provided)

benefits: On-site position in Sacramento clinical research facility
